hero.title: Welcome to Sof Xarid — Direct Procurement from Factories Without Middlemen
hero.subtitle: A simple and secure directory of verified manufacturers in Uzbekistan. Buy construction materials and industrial equipment directly at real factory prices.

about.title: About Sof Xarid Ecosystem
about.subtitle: Specifically designed for professional procurement and direct transactions
about.p1: Sof Xarid is a secure B2B/B2G digital procurement ecosystem. We cut out intermediaries, dealers, and fake agents, connecting verified manufacturers directly with enterprises and government organizations.
about.p2: Every supplier undergoes a multi-layered verification process to ensure transparency, security, and true factory pricing.
about.feature1_desc: No middlemen. Genuine manufacturer prices directly from production lines.
about.feature2_desc: Strict verification process prevents fraudulent agents and counterfeit products.
about.feature3_desc: Compliant with government procurement guidelines and digital standard documentation.

gov.title: Government Procurement Gateway
gov.subtitle: Securing national assets with 100% transparent direct transactions.
gov.p1: Sof Xarid serves as a secure gateway for federal and regional authorities. By eliminating secondary dealers, state organizations reduce financial leakage, bypass false bids, and purchase at actual factory rates.
gov.benefit1_desc: Blockchain-style immutable digital logs tracking contract issuance and pricing verification.
gov.benefit2_desc: Zero reseller margins. Save up to 35% of taxpayers' budgets on standard procurement lists.
gov.benefit3_desc: Fully digitized legal frameworks and escrow accounts protecting state transactions.
gov.benefit4_desc: Accelerated approval pipelines and synchronized API standard delivery mechanisms.

verification_page.title: 10-Level Verification System
verification_page.subtitle: How we guarantee 100% security, trust, and absolute compliance.
verification_page.desc: Before listing a single product, every manufacturer undergoes an intensive, ten-phase background and on-site inspection. This eliminates shell companies and ensures professional competence.
verification_page.step1_desc: Full legal incorporation background check and business registration authenticity verification.
verification_page.step2_desc: Exhaustive audits of fiscal history, tax clearances, and absence of outstanding state liabilities.
verification_page.step3_desc: In-person visual inspection of assembly yards, heavy facilities, and worker safety conditions.
verification_page.step4_desc: Detailed evaluation of maximum annual throughput, plant capabilities, and machinery state.
verification_page.step5_desc: Testing of random batch samples to ensure strict structural, chemical, and industrial compliance.
verification_page.step6_desc: Verification of ISO 9001, CE, EAC, state standards (GOST), and other essential regulatory licenses.
verification_page.step7_desc: Credit rating audits, liquid asset confirmation, and verified capital stability checks.
verification_page.step8_desc: Reference checks from prior commercial partners, dispute resolution history, and rating analyses.
verification_page.step9_desc: Strict check against anti-corruption databases, national blacklists, and export sanctions.
verification_page.step10_desc: Issuance of the cryptographically sealed Sof Xarid Verification Badge and directory activation.

about_page.title: Redefining Procurement with Absolute Trust
about_page.subtitle: Sof Xarid was founded to protect state budgets and commercial enterprises from margin inflation, broker cartels, and fraudulent supplier channels.
about_page.purpose_text: We envision a transparent B2B industrial ecosystem where manufacturers sell products at genuine base prices directly to buyers. By leveraging cryptographic verification, rigorous on-site inspection criteria, and standardized escrow frameworks, we secure critical national infrastructure projects and raw material transactions.
about_page.policy_text: Dealers, middlemen, commission brokers, and shell companies increase pricing without adding structural value. We enforce a strict 'Authorized Factories Only' protocol. Any attempt to register a secondary trading profile without direct assembly yards or raw production lines is filtered out during step 1 of our verification process.
about_page.principles_subtitle: The core values that guide our onboarding and contract facilitation procedures.
about_page.principle1_desc: Every single listing originates from a facility that has been physically visited, filmed, and audited by our engineers.
about_page.principle2_desc: Invoices and wire transfers are directed straight to the audited factory's corporate fiscal accounts.
about_page.principle3_desc: Contracts incorporate state-certified escrow provisions to guarantee product stress-tests prior to payment release.
about_page.principle4_desc: Factories link their raw materials throughput logs to avoid fake availability reports.
about_page.board_subtitle: Experienced engineers, risk assessors, and public policy advisors ensuring the ecosystem's integrity.
about_page.board_member1_desc: Former state procurement risk investigator with 15+ years of industrial audit oversight experience.
about_page.board_member2_desc: Industrial safety specialist. Assesses raw materials throughput, worker safety standards, and factory assembly lines.
about_page.board_member3_desc: Audits legal registrations, corporate liquidities, credit lines, bank liabilities, and tax certifications.
